GUARDIAN-ANCIENT_CONSTRUCT.description:
Gain {ArtifactPower:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold].
At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]Artifact[/gold], gain {AncientConstructPower:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold].
GUARDIAN-ANCIENT_CONSTRUCT.title: Ancient Construct
GUARDIAN-ANCIENT_POWER.description:
Gain {TemporaryStrengthUpPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Gain {TemporaryDexterityUpPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-ANCIENT_POWER.title: Ancient Power
GUARDIAN-BAUBLE_BURST.description: Each time you take attack damage, trigger your socketed [gold]Gem[/gold] effects.
GUARDIAN-BAUBLE_BURST.title: Bauble Burst
GUARDIAN-BODY_CRASH.title: Body Crash
GUARDIAN-CHARGE_CORE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Place this into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
[gold]Tick[/gold]: Draw a card.
When [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {RandomDamage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
GUARDIAN-CHARGE_CORE.title: Charge Core
GUARDIAN-CHARGE_UP.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain {NextTurnTemporaryStrengthUpPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for one turn.
GUARDIAN-CHARGE_UP.title: Charge Up
GUARDIAN-CLONE.description: [gold]Stasis[/gold] a copy of a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GUARDIAN-CLONE.title: Clone
GUARDIAN-COMPILE_PACKAGE.description: Choose 1 of {Cards:diff()} {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}[gold]Package[/gold] cards and add it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GUARDIAN-COMPILE_PACKAGE.title: Compile Package
GUARDIAN-CONSTRUCTION_FORM.description:
Gain {BufferPower:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold].
At the start of your turn, if you have [gold]Buffer[/gold], gain {ConstructionFormPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
GUARDIAN-CONSTRUCTION_FORM.title: Construction Form
GUARDIAN-CRYSTAL_RAY.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Gem[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
GUARDIAN-CRYSTAL_RAY.title: Crystal Ray
GUARDIAN-CRYSTAL_SHIV.title: Crystal Shiv
GUARDIAN-CRYSTAL_WARD.title: Crystal Ward
GUARDIAN-CURL_UP.title: Curl Up
GUARDIAN-DEFEND_GUARDIAN.title: Defend
GUARDIAN-EMERGENCY.title: Emergency
GUARDIAN-EVASIVE_PROTOCOL.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Brace [/gold]{EvasiveProtocolPower:diff()}.
GUARDIAN-EVASIVE_PROTOCOL.title: Evasive Protocol
GUARDIAN-EXPLOIT_GEMS.title: Exploit Gems
GUARDIAN-FIERCE_BASH.title: Fierce Bash
GUARDIAN-FLOATING_ORBS.description: Whenever you play a 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} card, deal {FloatingOrbsPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
GUARDIAN-FLOATING_ORBS.title: Floating Orbs
GUARDIAN-FUTURE_PLANS.description: At the end of your turn, place up to {FuturePlansPower:diff()} card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] in [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-FUTURE_PLANS.title: Future Plans
GUARDIAN-GEAR_UP.title: Gear Up
GUARDIAN-GEM_CANNON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Activate ALL of your [gold]Gems[/gold].
GUARDIAN-GEM_CANNON.title: Gem Cannon
GUARDIAN-GEM_FINDER.description: At the end of combat, you may add a random [gold]Gem[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
GUARDIAN-GEM_FINDER.title: Gem Finder
GUARDIAN-GIGA_BEAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Exit [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold].
GUARDIAN-GIGA_BEAM.title: Giga Beam
GUARDIAN-GUARDIAN_WHIRL.description: If you have at least {Threshold:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
GUARDIAN-GUARDIAN_WHIRL.title: Guardian Whirl
GUARDIAN-HARDEN.title: Harden
GUARDIAN-INCINERATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If your [gold]Stasis[/gold] slots are full, gain a [gold]Stasis[/gold] Slot.
GUARDIAN-INCINERATE.title: Incinerate
GUARDIAN-LASER_TURRET.title: Laser Turret
GUARDIAN-MULTI_BEAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies X times.
[gold]Accelerate[/gold] X times.
GUARDIAN-MULTI_BEAM.title: Multi-Beam
GUARDIAN-ORBWALK.title: Orbwalk
GUARDIAN-ORB_SUPPORT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Randomly place a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-ORB_SUPPORT.title: Orb Support
GUARDIAN-OVERLOAD.title: Overload
GUARDIAN-SHARED_FLUX.title: Shared Flux
GUARDIAN-SHARED_FLUX.description:
Choose another player.
The chosen player may choose a card in their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to place into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-OVERBLOCK.title: Overblock
GUARDIAN-OVERBLOCK.description: Whenever you enter [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold], the ally with the least [gold]Block[/gold] gains {OverblockBlockPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {OverblockThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-PLANNING.description: [gold]Stasis[/gold] the top {Cards:diff()} cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
GUARDIAN-PLANNING.title: Planning
GUARDIAN-PIERCING_HIDE.title: Piercing Hide
GUARDIAN-POLY_BEAM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
GUARDIAN-POLY_BEAM.title: Poly Beam
GUARDIAN-PREPROGRAM.description:
Look at the top {Cards:diff()} cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Choose one and place it into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-PREPROGRAM.title: Preprogram
GUARDIAN-PRIMING_SHOT.title: Priming Shot
GUARDIAN-PRISMATIC_BARRIER.description: Gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Gem[/gold] in this card.
GUARDIAN-PRISMATIC_BARRIER.title: Prismatic Barrier
GUARDIAN-PRISMATIC_SPRAY.description: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Gem[/gold] in this card.
GUARDIAN-PRISMATIC_SPRAY.title: Prismatic Spray
GUARDIAN-RECOVER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Brace [/gold]{Brace:diff()}.
Place a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-RECOVER.title: Recover
GUARDIAN-REFRACTED_BEAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] any number of times.
Repeat {GemRepeat:diff()} times:
GUARDIAN-REFRACTED_BEAM.title: Refracted Beam
GUARDIAN-REPULSOR_GUARDIAN.description: Whenever you [gold]Stasis[/gold] an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw {ExhaustStatusesPower:diff()} card(s).
GUARDIAN-REPULSOR_GUARDIAN.title: Repulsor
GUARDIAN-REROUTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Place the next not [gold]Exhausting[/gold] Attack or Skill you play this turn into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-REROUTE.title: Reroute
GUARDIAN-RESILIENT_PLATE.title: Resilient Plate
GUARDIAN-REVENGE_PROTOCOL.title: Revenge Protocol
GUARDIAN-ROLL_ATTACK.title: Roll Attack
GUARDIAN-SECOND_SLAM.title: Second Slam
GUARDIAN-SENTRY_BLAST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Place a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Sentry Wave+|Sentry Wave}[/gold] into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-SENTRY_BLAST.title: Sentry Blast
GUARDIAN-SENTRY_WAVE.title: Sentry Wave
GUARDIAN-SHIELD_CHARGER.title: Shield Charger
GUARDIAN-SHIELD_SPIKES.title: Shield Spikes
GUARDIAN-SPEED_BOOST.title: Speed Boost
GUARDIAN-SPHERIC_SHIELD.title: Spheric Shield
GUARDIAN-SPIKER_PROTOCOL.description: Whenever you end your turn in [gold]Defensive Mode[/gold], gain {SpikerProtocolPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
GUARDIAN-SPIKER_PROTOCOL.title: Spiker Protocol
GUARDIAN-STASIS_ENGINE.title: Stasis Engine
GUARDIAN-STASIS_FIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Tick[/gold]: Increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()} for this combat.
GUARDIAN-STASIS_FIELD.title: Stasis Field
GUARDIAN-STASIS_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Tick[/gold]: Increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()} for this combat.
GUARDIAN-STASIS_STRIKE.title: Stasis Strike
GUARDIAN-STRIKE_FOR_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy attacks you for {EnemyDamage:diff()} damage.
GUARDIAN-STRIKE_FOR_STRIKE.title: Strike for Strike
GUARDIAN-STRIKE_GUARDIAN.title: Strike
GUARDIAN-SUSPENSION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Place a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-SUSPENSION.title: Suspension
GUARDIAN-TEMPORAL_SHIELD.title: Temporal Shield
GUARDIAN-TEMPORAL_STRIKE.title: Temporal Strike
GUARDIAN-TIME_BOMB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Place a random generated card into [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-TIME_BOMB.title: Time Bomb
GUARDIAN-TIME_CAPACITOR.title: Time Capacitor
GUARDIAN-TIME_SIFTER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {TimeSifterPower:diff()} [gold]Stasis[/gold] Slot(s).
GUARDIAN-TIME_SIFTER.title: Time Sifter
GUARDIAN-TWIN_SLAM.title: Twin Slam
GUARDIAN-VENT_STEAM.title: Vent Steam
GUARDIAN-WALKER_CLAW.title: Walker Claw
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_ANCIENTS.title: Package: Ancients
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_BRONZE.title: Package: Bronze
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_BRONZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Stasis[/gold] a card.
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_DEFECT.title: Package: Defect
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_ORBWALKER.title: Package: Orbwalker
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_SENTRY.title: Package: Sentry
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_SENTRY.description:
Place a [gold]Sentry Blast+[/gold] into [gold]Stasis[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Place a [gold]Sentry Wave+[/gold] into [gold]Stasis[/gold].|}
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_SHAPES.title: Package: Shapes
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_SHAPES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw a card.
Gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
GUARDIAN-PACKAGE_SPHERIC.title: Package: Spheric
GUARDIAN-DELAY_FIELD.title: Delay Field
GUARDIAN-SHARP_HIDE.title: Sharp Hide
GUARDIAN-SHARP_HIDE.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain {SharpHidePower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold] for one turn.
GUARDIAN-RECHARGE.title: Recharge
GUARDIAN-SERRATE.title: Serrate
GUARDIAN-SERRATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to {ExtraDamage:diff()} times your [gold]Thorns[/gold].
GUARDIAN-TEMPORAL_REFRACTION.title: Temporal Refraction
GUARDIAN-TEMPORAL_REFRACTION.description: Double the first [gold]Gem[/gold] effect you activate each turn.
GUARDIAN-BRILLIANT_SCALES.title: Brilliant Scales
GUARDIAN-BRILLIANT_SCALES.description: Now and at the start of your turn,
GUARDIAN-ROCK_SLIDE.title: Rock Slide
GUARDIAN-ROCK_SLIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Presocketed with a common, uncommon, and rare [gold]Gem[/gold].
GUARDIAN-HIGH_FREQUENCY.title: High Frequency
GUARDIAN-HIGH_FREQUENCY.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Fill your [gold]Stasis[/gold] slots with copies of it.
GUARDIAN-BRONZE_BRAMBLES.title: Bronze Brambles
GUARDIAN-BRONZE_BRAMBLES.description: Whenever you are debuffed, also gain {BronzeBramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
GUARDIAN-MAXIMUM_OVERDRIVE.title: Maximum Overdrive
GUARDIAN-MAXIMUM_OVERDRIVE.description: Whenever a card ticks down in [gold]Stasis[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
GUARDIAN-STASIS_EGG.title: Stasis Egg
GUARDIAN-STASIS_EGG.description:
[gold]Brace [/gold]{Brace:diff()}.
[gold]Stasis[/gold] a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], or [gold]Hand[/gold].
